headline: Corporate Finance: Capital Structure and Valuation
description: Corporate finance addresses how firms raise capital and make investment decisions. Capital structure (debt vs equity) and valuation (what assets are worth) are the core concerns.

citation.name: The Cost of Capital, Corporation Finance and the Theory of Investment
Principles of Corporate Finance (15th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Brealey R.A., Myers S.C., Allen F.

citation.name: Valuation: Measuring and Managing the Value of Companies (2025)
citation.author: Koller T., Goedhart M., Wessels D.
